text.font-family: Excalifont, Xiaolai, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji

g.text: Single ReLU Neuron: Two Hand-Worked Examples

text.font-family: Excalifont, Xiaolai, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji
Excalifont, Xiaolai, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji
Excalifont, Xiaolai, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji

g.text: 1. z is the pre-activation value: z = wx + b

text.font-family: Excalifont, Xiaolai, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji
Excalifont, Xiaolai, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji

g.text: 3. If z > 0, ReLU' = 1, so gradients can flow

text.font-family: Excalifont, Xiaolai, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji

g.text: 4. If z < 0, ReLU' = 0, so gradients are blocked

text.font-family: Excalifont, Xiaolai, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji

g.text: 5. Dead ReLU means the neuron outputs 0 and stops learning because its gradient stays 0
